title: Optimal Engagement Range
summary: Selecting combat range based on ship capabilities and enemy loadout.
details: Every ship has an optimal engagement range based on weapons and defenses. Heavy armor and short-range weapons: close to knife-fighting range. Long-range weapons and light armor: maintain standoff distance. Know enemy capabilities: if they want close range, deny it; if they want distance, close aggressively. Pilot should maintain range that favors your loadout while denying enemy their preferred range.
annotations: Intelligence on enemy ships is critical for range selection.
Range control is often the deciding factor in combat.
